text: The best surf school in Weligama, super kind and helpful staff and instructors. Honest prices and maximum effectiveness in organizing and moving lessons. They also help you organize something else for your vacation. Greetings from Italy to my friend Raju. See you soon brothers
Very friendly staff and helpful instructors, you can also chill there before and after class!
This school got us recommended from our hostel and it was a lot of fun. The instructor explained super well and was very patient with us. I definitely recommend this surf school !
Very friendly staf, good teachers and comfortable sunbeds
This was our first time ever surfing and the be cool team were very supportive and patient. Highly recommend going, instructors are very funny and sociable, will definitely be back for more fun

Fantastic experience at this surf camp. The team is super organized for lessons at all levels. They also have sunbeds and additional services. The boards are top quality. The best part is the people running the school — super friendly.
